info.name: Office Management API (v1)
info.description:
Office Management API v1.

**Images:** Responses include `url`, `livePhotoUrl`, `cvUrl`. Set server `.env` `APP_PUBLIC_URL={{baseUrl}}`. Use **Verify image URL** request after profile upload.

**Projects:** `tlUserId`, `memberUserIds`, `GET /projects/reports/overview`, `PUT /projects/:id/progress`.

**Variables:** `baseUrl`, `token`, `staffId`, `userId`, `tlUserId`, `teamId`, `projectId`, `imageUrl`, …

request.description: Success: `data.token`, `data.role`, `data.status`, `data.mustChangePassword`. Save `data.token` to collection variable `token` for Bearer auth.
Always returns 200 with the same `message` (no email enumeration). Check email or server logs (dev) for the 6-digit OTP.
`otp` must be exactly 6 digits from the forgot-password email (or dev console).
Requires Bearer token. Only while account is `PENDING_APPROVAL` (draft). Body: any subset of registration fields; at least one field required.
SUPER_ADMIN can set any role; others follow promotion rules. Target user must be ACTIVE. Success: `data.user`.

item.name: Add Stock Movement IN (with verification images)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Wedding catering - June",
  "description": "Full-service catering for 200 guests",
  "clientName": "Acme Corp",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "budget": 500000,
  "revenue": 150000,
  "currency": "INR",
  "startDate": "2026-06-01",
  "endDate": "2026-06-15",
  "teamId": "{{teamId}}",
  "tlUserId": "{{tlUserId}}",
  "managerUserId": "{{userId}}",
  "memberUserIds": ["{{staffId}}"]
}

request.description: Roles: SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, MANAGER, ACCOUNTANT. Auto-generates `code` (e.g. PRJ-0001). Success: `data.project`.
Includes `memberCount` and `tlUserId`. TL sees only their projects.
summary + projects list with progressPercent per project
Dashboard in `data.summary`: totalProjects, totalRevenue, totalBudget, byStatus, etc.
